_comment: Sample SNS event for testing the Lambda dispatcher via the AWS Console Test tab.
Simulates an End User Messaging Social (WhatsApp) inbound text message.
AWS End User Messaging Social wraps the WhatsApp webhook payload in a
second JSON serialisation before publishing to SNS.  The structure is:
The dispatcher must therefore call JSON.parse() twice:
1. Parse SNS.Message to get the outer envelope object.
2. Parse outerEnvelope.whatsAppWebhookEntry to get the WhatsApp payload.
1. Open the Lambda function ClawBoutiqueDispatcher in the AWS Console.
3. Paste this entire JSON object as the test event body.
4. Click 'Test' and inspect the CloudWatch log output.
"text": { "body": "Hi! Do you still have the black crop top in size S?" }

Sns.Message: {"whatsAppWebhookEntry":"{\"object\":\"whatsapp_business_account\",\"entry\":[{\"id\":\"WBA_ID_001\",\"changes\":[{\"value\":{\"messaging_product\":\"whatsapp\",\"metadata\":{\"display_phone_number\":\"+639171234567\",\"phone_number_id\":\"PN_ID_CLAWBOUTIQUE\"},\"contacts\":[{\"profile\":{\"name\":\"Maria Santos\"},\"wa_id\":\"639181234567\"}],\"messages\":[{\"id\":\"wamid.HBgLNjM5MTgxMjM0NTY3FQIAEhggABC123XYZ\",\"from\":\"639181234567\",\"timestamp\":\"1717243200\",\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":{\"body\":\"Hi! Do you still have the black crop top in size S?\"}}]},\"field\":\"messages\"}]}]}"}
Sns.Subject: WhatsAppWebhookEvent
